images.title: Cosmic Lord Shiva Face
images.description: A mesmerizing close-up of Lord Shiva's face, adorned with cosmic elements and a serene expression.

images.title: Shiva's Trident in the Storm
images.description: A powerful image of Lord Shiva's trident piercing through a stormy sky, symbolizing his strength and control over chaos.

images.title: Shiva's Dance of Creation
images.description: An artistic depiction of Lord Shiva performing the cosmic dance, surrounded by vibrant colors and dynamic energy.

images.title: Shiva's Meditation in the Himalayas
images.description: A serene image of Lord Shiva meditating on a mountaintop, with the majestic Himalayas in the background.

images.title: Shiva's Third Eye Awakening
images.description: A captivating image of Lord Shiva's third eye opening, radiating intense energy and wisdom.

images.title: Temple Bells and Morning Light
images.description: A devotional frame capturing the peaceful atmosphere of early worship at Kantore.

images.title: Sacred Procession Moment
images.description: A vibrant visual from the festival procession filled with rhythm, color, and faith.

images.title: Ritual Fire and Devotion
images.description: A striking image reflecting the intensity and purity of Shiva rituals.

images.title: Evening Aarti at Kantore
images.description: An evening devotional scene illuminated by prayer lamps and collective reverence.
